rationale: Aligned Source Design Requirements in spec.md to the Jira brief coverage IDs DESIGN-REQ-006, DESIGN-REQ-011, DESIGN-REQ-019, DESIGN-REQ-022, DESIGN-REQ-023, and DESIGN-REQ-024 instead of local DESIGN-REQ-001 through DESIGN-REQ-004 numbering.

Added explicit mappings from docs/Tasks/TaskRemediation.md sections 14.1 and 16.x into the Source Design Requirements table, including artifact presentation/redaction and bounded degraded evidence handling.
The broad review summary was addressed by correcting the inconsistent requirement IDs and source-section traceability across spec.md, plan.md, tasks.md, and verification.md.
